allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Total products: {len\(data\)}''''\); [print\(f''''  id={p[""id""]} price={p.get\(""price"",""?""\)} allergens={p.get\(""allergens"",""?""\)} producer={p.get\(""producer"",""?""\)}''''\) for p in data[:5]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''{len\(data\)} products''''\); [print\(f''''  {p[""name""]}: £{p[""price""]}''''\) for p in data[:5]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''{len\(data\)} products''''\); [print\(f''''  {p[""name""]}: allergens={p.get\(""allergens"",""none""\)}''''\) for p in data[:5]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''{len\(data\)} products''''\); [print\(f''''  {p[""name""]}: producer={p.get\(""producer"",""?""\)}''''\) for p in data[:5]]")
